message:
fix(cli): update workflow enabled test to iterate BUILTIN_WORKFLOW_NAMES

Replace hardcoded per-workflow enabled/not-enabled assertions with a
loop over BUILTIN_WORKFLOW_NAMES, asserting all built-in workflows are
enabled by default. This matches the config default change where
workflows.enabled defaults to empty vec (all built-in).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
